ksa_text: Manage data operations and system reliability, including monitoring execution schedules, investigating failures, planning data recovery and redundancy procedures, implementing observability and telemetry infrastructure, and analyzing operational patterns.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-007 (OP, Task) maps to Geospatial Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4422 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.442, eu_ai_act=0.413, dcwf=0.409. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4422 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-007 (OP, composite 0.4422) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4422 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4422 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4422, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
